items.content_html: My Neovim configuration includes a wide range of plugins and settings, carefully chosen and integrated to enhance my productivity and coding experience. The plugins and settings are tailored to my specific needs as a DevOps Engineer, and can easily be customized to meet the needs of others.

The plugins and settings are tailored to my specific needs as a DevOps Engineer, and can easily be customized to meet the needs of others.

items.content_html: 🏙 A clean, dark Neovim theme written in Lua, with support for lsp, treesitter and lots of plugins. Includes additional themes for Kitty, Alacritty, iTerm and Fish.
